meta.title: Flying the MOST COMPLEX Machine Ever Created
meta.description:
For 21 FREE meals with HelloFresh plus free shipping, use code HASARD21 at https://bit.ly/3Klolhn!

This is the fastest and most complex flying machine that mankind ever created. 2.5 million moving parts and capable of 25 times the speed of sound!

Buy Terry's Book here: https://www.amazon.com/How-Astronaut-Insiders-Leaving-Planet/dp/1664494669

WIN A FLIGHT IN A REAL FIGHTER JET 👉  giveaway has ended

Every 100th person wins a PATCH:  https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/patchgiveaway

For collaborations, reach out to hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

📷 Produced by:  Michael Cunningham, Nicole Livering

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos and giveaways▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
